name: Manchester City 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The iconic sky blue home jersey featuring the club's signature color with modern performance fabric technology. Designed for match-day comfort with moisture-wicking properties and breathable mesh panels.

name: Real Madrid 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The classic white home jersey with elegant gold accents, celebrating Real Madrid's legendary heritage. Premium fabric with advanced ventilation for peak performance.

name: Liverpool 2025/26 Away Jersey
description: A bold away jersey inspired by the city's rich cultural heritage. Features a unique colorway with subtle pattern details and Nike Dri-FIT technology.

name: Barcelona 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The iconic Blaugrana stripes reimagined for the new season. Features Nike Vapor technology for ultimate comfort on and off the pitch.

name: Bayern Munich 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The classic red home jersey with diamond pattern details. Features adidas HEAT.RDY technology for maximum breathability during intense matches.

name: Paris Saint-Germain 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The iconic navy jersey with red central stripe, a timeless design that represents Parisian football excellence. Nike Dri-FIT ADV technology for elite performance.

name: Arsenal 2025/26 Third Jersey
description: A striking third kit with a bold design that pushes boundaries. Features adidas AEROREADY technology for moisture management and all-day comfort.

name: Inter Milan 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The iconic Nerazzurri stripes, reimagined with a modern twist. Features Nike Vapor knit technology for superior fit and performance on the pitch.

name: Chelsea 2025/26 Away Jersey
description: A fresh away design that honors Chelsea's tradition while embracing innovation. Nike Dri-FIT technology keeps you dry and comfortable.

name: Brazil 2025 Home Jersey
description: The legendary yellow jersey of the Selecao, symbol of the most successful national team in football history. Features Nike Vaporknit technology for professional-level performance.

name: Germany 2025 Home Jersey
description: The classic white jersey with black and red accents, representing German football tradition. adidas HEAT.RDY technology for optimal temperature regulation.

name: Manchester United 2025/26 Training Jersey
description: Training jersey designed for the pitch and the streets. Features adidas AEROREADY moisture-wicking technology with the iconic Manchester United crest.

name: AC Milan 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The iconic red and black Rossoneri stripes, a symbol of Italian football excellence. PUMA dryCELL technology for superior moisture management.

name: Borussia Dortmund 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The vibrant yellow and black jersey of Die Schwarzgelben. PUMA dryCELL technology ensures you stay dry whether on the pitch or in the stands.

name: Atletico Madrid 2025/26 Home Jersey
description: The classic red and white stripes of Los Colchoneros. Nike Dri-FIT technology for comfort during the most intense matches.

name: Argentina 2025 Home Jersey
description: The legendary Albiceleste stripes, worn by the reigning world champions. Features Nike Vaporknit technology for professional-level performance and comfort.
